data.name: Dream Girlfriend: Twitch Thot
data.detailed_description:
Dream Girlfriend: Twitch Thot 18+ is an adult-only visual novel with match-3 minigames.

You play as a most ordinary guy who spends most of his life watching anime and live streams. But one day everything changes - he is given a chance to meet his idol, Alice, a stunning girl streamer, and play a strip game with her, right in front of thousands of viewers!

Join the stream to find what Alice is hiding behind her "perfect girl" facade and... her clothes!

KEY FEATURES

  • Captivating story
  • Relaxing gameplay
  • Character animation
  • In-game gallery
  • Achievements (optional)
  • Free 5K resolution wallpaper pack

data.short_description: Alice is back online! Join the stream to find what Alice is hiding behind her "perfect girl" facade and... her clothes!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or later
  • 處理器: 2.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 750 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10 or later
  • 處理器: 2.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 5000
  • 儲存空間: 750 MB 可用空間
